content.en:
In front of the True Saintless Tower, a huge projection shows the achievements of a famous passer.

Ye Tian saw that sixteen Eternal Realm Lords were displayed on the projection, and the cultivation of each Eternal Realm Lord was displayed.

At present, one of the legendary Eternal Realm powerhouses with the best results is called the Silver Moon Lord, and at this time, the other party has already broken through to the seventh layer.

Ye Tian looked at it for a while, and suddenly the Silver Moon Lord broke into the eighth layer.

This completely shocked the many Eternal Realm Lords who were watching outside.

"The Silver Moon Lord actually broke through to the eighth layer, if he broke through the eighth and ninth layers, even if he couldn't break through the tenth layer, he would be able to join the True No Holy Land, and joining the True No Holy Land in the way of breaking into the True No Holy Tower, it was not an ordinary disciple, at least it was a very high position. "

"It's a bit difficult for the Silver Moon Lord to break through the ninth layer, I've heard of the Silver Moon Lord, it is said that she is the daughter of a certain transcendent realm lord, her strength is good, but she doesn't have any outstanding records. "

"Maybe you can break through the ninth layer, after all, no matter how powerful the person is, it won't really be revealed, but the Silver Moon Lord's father is a transcendent realm lord, so there is no need for her to join the True No Holy Land. "

"The Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord is nothing to the True No Holy Land, the True No Holy Land has a Legendary Realm Lord, and if you join the True No Holy Land, you will have a backer, not to mention that there is a Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord Father, even if there is a half-step Legendary Realm Lord Father, you can also choose to join the True No Holy Land and have a stronger backer!"

"Yes, for us and others, the Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm is an unthinkable existence, but for the True Saintless Land, it is really nothing. "

......

"It's time to break into the Truly Saintless Tower!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Wow!

He entered the True Void Saint Tower, and the True Void Saint Pagoda directly probed his basic information, such as coming from other Eternal Seas, as well as being called the Endless Lord, which could be deduced from the innate eternal rules, unless Ye Tian deliberately concealed it

Soon, the name of the Endless Lord appeared on the projection screen of the outside world.

As for the Endless Lords, those Eternal Realm Lords outside didn't care much, after all, Ye Tian didn't have any achievements, so there was nothing to care about.

On the first layer of the True Saintless Tower, Ye Tian met three legendary lords of the Initial Realm, and their cultivation was the same as Ye Tian's.

Ye Tian only needed to defeat them before he could break through the first layer.

And the strength of these three Legendary Lords is naturally very weak and weak, basically any Origin Realm Legendary Lord can easily defeat them.

Sure enough.

Ye Tian killed them in one move and broke through the first layer of the True Saintless Tower.

Ye Tian then broke through the second, third, and fourth layers, and gradually attracted the attention of some Eternal Realm lords outside.

On the seventh layer of the Void Saint Tower, Ye Tian entered here and quickly defeated the three Origin Realm Legendary Lords.

In fact, the Origin Realm Legendary Lord of the seventh layer was already very powerful, surpassing the normal level.

At this time, Ye Tian broke through the seventh layer, and his reputation became famous.

Even if Ye Tian didn't break through the ninth layer, his reputation would definitely spread.

At this time, the Eternal Realm outside was discussing Ye Tian.

"Who is this Endless Lord?"

"Didn't you mention it above, if it is not the legendary lord of the Infinite Sea, it should be the legendary lord of the other Eternal Sea. "

"We can't recognize all the legendary lords of the Infinite Sea, and the other legendary lords of the Eternal Sea, we naturally don't know even more. "

"But from this day forward, this legendary lord called the Endless Lord will spread his reputation in the Immeasurable Sea. "

"This Endless Lord is very fast at breaking into the tower, maybe there is still hope to break through the ninth layer and join the True Saintless Tower!"

......

Soon, Ye Tian broke through the eighth layer again, and it didn't take long to break through the ninth layer.

At this moment, the Eternal Realm in the outside world was shocked.

The Endless Lord has really passed through the ninth layer and is about to become a member of the True Void Holy Land.

However, Ye Tian did not leave the True Void Holy Pagoda, although he did not know what the benefits would be if he continued to break through the tenth and eleventh layers, but the higher the number of layers he broke through, the higher his status in the True Void Holy Land would inevitably be, and he would be qualified to let the True Void Holy Land bless the Source Sea

If it was just an ordinary Holy Land disciple, it might not be able to make the legendary lords of the Qin family jealous.

The tenth layer still didn't stop Ye Tian, and Ye Tian also broke through very easily.

When Ye Tian broke through to the eleventh layer and was fighting with the three Origin Realm Legendary Lords on the eleventh layer, the Silver Moon Lord had broken through the eighth layer and was impacting the ninth layer.

After a while, Ye Tian broke into the twelfth layer, and the Silver Moon Lord was still on the ninth layer.

At this time, more Eternal Realm was paying attention to the Silver Moon Lord, after all, Ye Tian would definitely be able to join the True Saintless Land, there was no sense of expectation, as for how many levels they could pass through, they were shocked in addition to being shocked, and they didn't know what to say

Time passes slowly –

"'Boom!'"

The ninth layer is displayed behind the name of the Silver Moon Lord, representing that the Silver Moon Lord has finally broken through the ninth layer.

Not long after, the Silver Moon Lord came out of the True Void Holy Tower, obviously she was defeated on the tenth layer and had no way to continue breaking through, but she still passed the entrance examination of the True Void Holy Land.

When the Silver Moon Lord came out of the True Void Holy Tower, the Nameless Eternal Realm congratulated, "Congratulations to the Silver Moon Lord for successfully joining the True Void Holy Land!"

The Silver Moon Lord was also in a good mood, and said, "Thank you very much for your congratulations!"

Suddenly, she noticed that many of the eyes of the Eternal Realm were still staring at the projection screen, so she also looked at it curiously.

At this look, she was directly dumbfounded.

Endless Lord, Twelfth Floor!

This means that this legendary lord called the Endless Lord has already passed the twelfth layer

And she had only broken through the ninth floor, and the joy in her heart was suddenly half gone, and she was deeply stimulated.

"Who is this Endless Lord?"

The Silver Moon Lord asked curiously.

At this time, an Eternal Realm said, "Silver Moon Lord, who this Endless Lord is, we don't know, he entered the True Void Saint Tower after you, no one knows him, and they don't know which Eternal Sea he came from. "

Seeing that the other Eternal Realms didn't know, the Silver Moon Lord didn't ask anymore, but watched silently.

She was very curious about how many layers Ye Tian could break through the True Saintless Tower, and then the difference in the strength of the opponents in each layer was not very large, but after the twelfth layer, the difficulty of breaking through each layer was extremely huge.

After another period of time, Ye Tian broke through the fifteenth layer.

At this time, Ye Tian also felt some pressure. _
